CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
if self:IsClient() then local playerController = self.Entity.PlayerControllerComponent
if playerController ~= nil then playerController.LookDirectionX = 1 playerController.AlwaysMovingState = self.IsAutoMoving end
--[[ if self.Entity.MovementComponent ~= nil then self.Entity.MovementComponent.InputSpeed = self.MoveSpeed end]] end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnUpdate
CodeBlockMethod.Code: if self.Entity.MovementComponent ~= nil then if self.IsAutoMoving then self.Entity.MovementComponent.InputSpeed = self.MoveSpeed self.Entity.MovementComponent:MoveToDirection(Vector2(1, 0), delta) else --self.Entity.MovementComponent:Stop() end end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: ToggleAutoMove
CodeBlockMethod.Code: self.IsAutoMoving = not self.IsAutoMoving log("[서버] IsAutoMoving 변경: " .. tostring(self.IsAutoMoving))

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnSyncProperty
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local playerController = self.Entity.PlayerControllerComponent if name == "IsAutoMoving" then if playerController ~= nil then playerController.AlwaysMovingState = value playerController.LookDirectionX = 1 end end
local button = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/AutoToggleButton")
if button ~= nil then if button.TextComponent ~=nil then if value then button.TextComponent.Text = "자동: ON" else button.TextComponent.Text = "자동: OFF" end end end
if value then playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("MoveUp") playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("MoveDown") playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("MoveLeft") playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("MoveRight") playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("Jump") playerController:RemoveAllActionKeyByActionName("Attack") else playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.W, "MoveUp") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.S,"MoveDown") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.A, "MoveLeft") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.D, "MoveRight") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.Space, "Jump") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.LeftControl, "Attack")
playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.UpArrow, "MoveUp") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.DownArrow,"MoveDown") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.LeftArrow, "MoveLeft") playerController:SetActionKey(KeyboardKey.RightArrow, "MoveRight") end
